title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A fully static personal portfolio website built with HTML, Tailwind CSS, and a Node.js build pipeline. Features a home page, about page, and auto-generated project pages from a JSON data file. Designed for GitHub Pages hosting with SEO-friendly pre-rendered HTML.

title: Student Grade Manager
description: A Java desktop application for managing student grades and academic records. Supports adding students, assigning grades per subject, calculating GPA, and exporting reports. Built with object-oriented principles and a clean Swing-based GUI.

title: News Articles aggregator
description: An interactive web app that visually demonstrates how common sorting and pathfinding algorithms work step-by-step. Supports Bubble Sort, Merge Sort, Quick Sort, and Dijkstra's algorithm. Useful as an educational tool for understanding algorithmic complexity.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: A responsive weather dashboard that fetches real-time weather data from the OpenWeatherMap API. Displays current conditions, a 5-day forecast, humidity, wind speed, and dynamic weather icons. Supports city search with location auto-complete.
